title: The Hillier & Lieberman Algorithmic Approach to Game Theory
description: A flowchart depicting the systematic process for analyzing and solving strategic games as presented in Hillier and Lieberman's foundational operations research text.
elements: Set Up Payoff Matrix or Game Tree
Apply Solution Algorithm (e.g., Iterated Elimination, Best Response Analysis)
relationships: Process starts with Game Formulation, which feeds into Identifying the Equilibrium Concept
The chosen concept dictates how to Set Up the Payoff Matrix or Game Tree
The setup is then analyzed using an Apply Solution Algorithm step to find the Reach Solution
The solution is finally tested with a Perform Sensitivity Analysis feedback loop
